channel.title: Thoreau Daily Journal
channel.description: A daily entry from Henry David Thoreau's journals, delivered fresh each day.

item.title: SUSPICION
item.description: July 15. What though friends misinterpret your conduct, if it is right in sight of God and Nature. The wrong, if there be any, pertains only to the wrongdoer, nor is the integrity of your relations to the universe affected, but you may gather encouragement from their mistrust. If the friend withhold his favor, yet does greater float gratuitous on the zephyr.
